title: Accretioned Horizons
description: A mod that adds various space related features!
body:
## V1.1.0

Have you ever wanted to discover the secrets of the **Universe**? Well, this mod's got that covered, bringing new **items**, **blocks**, and the **ability** to accumulate the power of a **Black Hole**.

This mod comes packed with: **A New Dimension**, New **Space related Items & Blocks**, and... **Black Holes**?

The new **Dimension** is an **asteroid** that got caught in a **Black Hole's Accretion Disk**, the asteroid contains valuable **resources**, and even some **ǎ̷̼͉̦l̴͙̀į̵͉̩̌̆͌ę̸̮̞̇͠͠n̴̢͔̔̇ remnants**.

**Collecting 10 Deepslate and using Nova Dust on it and lighting it using the Horizon Opener, this asteroid will permanently be accessible to you.**

**Will you obtain the Black Hole's Power? Play the Mod and find out...**

**### !! MOD REQUIRES [MCREATOR LINK](https://mcreator.net/download/link) (and the mod's version) !!** _e.g: Mod's version is 1.20.1 then Install MCreator Link 1.20.1_

### Curseforge Version: [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/accretioned-horizons](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/accretioned-horizons)
